purpose: Record the full improvement-candidate list discovered from the 100-task batch before dedupe and gate selection.

candidates.problem: Original-reference scoring cannot run because the four original TXT files are unavailable.
candidates.recommended_improvement: Keep source availability as a hard preflight gate and do not produce original-reference scores until the source TXT files exist.

candidates.problem: Several sample display names are mojibake, which makes reports and operator review unreliable.
candidates.recommended_improvement: Normalize sample display names to stable Korean labels and add an encoding sanity check to the registry audit.

candidates.problem: The run manifest still says each job is started_calibration_only after the 100-task batch finished.
candidates.recommended_improvement: Update job statuses from batch outputs and make stale statuses fail the registry audit.

candidates.problem: The channel-gate fix was applied to candidate files, but the reusable recreation template still does not force the same channel contract.
candidates.recommended_improvement: Patch the reusable sample recreation contract so future generated candidates must include at least two active information channels before evaluation.

candidates.problem: The 100-task ledger recorded final deduped outcomes but not each task's own improvement-candidate observation.
candidates.recommended_improvement: Store task-level candidate observations separately from deduped system improvement points.

candidates.problem: The 100-task batch replayed existing v4 candidates instead of generating a fresh candidate per task.
candidates.recommended_improvement: Separate structural replay batches from creative regeneration batches and label the mode explicitly.

candidates.problem: The core original-reference evaluation path has not been exercised because every task stopped at source availability.
candidates.recommended_improvement: Add a fixture-backed original-reference test case so the compare gate can be tested even while real source TXT files are missing.

candidates.problem: Lexicon checks ran, but the Korean humanization and AI-tell guard lane was not run because these outputs are still candidates, not final manuscripts.
candidates.recommended_improvement: Add a candidate/final distinction to reports and require humanize plus AI-tell guard only when a candidate is promoted to final manuscript.

candidates.problem: Each evaluation_v4 file is simply BLOCKED, which hides secondary results such as style channel pass or lexicon pass.
candidates.recommended_improvement: Split evaluation status into source_status, style_status, lexicon_status, and overall_status.

candidates.problem: Applying system improvements repeatedly inside the same task can create duplicate work and unclear causality.
candidates.recommended_improvement: Queue one task-level point, run a between-task system update gate, and verify the result on the next task.

candidates.problem: The 100-task runner exists under the active project but is not part of the reusable package manifest.
candidates.recommended_improvement: Decide whether the runner is project-only tooling or promote it into package scripts with tests.

candidates.problem: The final report listed only 3 deduped system points and did not expose the broader candidate list.
candidates.recommended_improvement: Always report both raw improvement candidates and deduped applied system points after large task batches.
